channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-19
item.description:
It's been an exciting week in our open-source research community, with notable progress made across multiple projects. In the scienceverse/metacheck project, Lakens added a new item called "japs jamovi" to the data check functionality, expanding the tool's capabilities. Meanwhile, the marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing project saw significant updates, including the build of the site for tenzing@0.4.1 by Anka and improvements to the wording and formatting by Alex O. Holcombe. These updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with a focus on enhancing user experience and functionality. As our community continues to grow and collaborate, we celebrate the achievements of our contributors and look forward to seeing the impact of their work. With these latest developments, we're one step closer to advancing research and innovation in our field.

33 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
regcheck9 commits
metacheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits
